expectations.text: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Selects only the staged bugfix files and excludes unstaged README noise.
Uses commit message shape with Summary, Rationale, Tests, and trailer block.
expectations.evidence: fix(rate-limit): adjust retry backoff for rate limits

expectations.text: Uses Fixes #456 and the default Copilot trailer.
expectations.evidence:
fix(rate-limit): adjust retry backoff for rate limits

Summary:
- Adjust the staged retry backoff behavior for rate-limit handling.
- Add coverage for the backoff bugfix in the test suite.
Rationale:
- Prevent incorrect retry timing when rate limits occur.
- Lock in the fix with regression coverage.
Tests:
- not run (dry run)
Fixes #456
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

expectations.text: Plans both push and PR creation.
Sets the PR title to the commit subject and includes the issue in the body.
expectations.evidence:
{"pr_title": "adjust retry backoff for rate limits", "subject": "adjust retry backoff for rate limits", "pr_body": "Summary:
- adjust retry backoff for rate limits
Issues:
